office_does: A state representative writes and votes on state laws and budgets, conducts oversight, and represents their legislative district.
race_blurb: Incumbent Chris Corry faces former representative Jack McEntire.

candidates.summary: Corry is an incumbent representative and House deputy minority leader emphasizing fiscal restraint, public safety, parental rights, housing supply, and less regulation.
highlights: Supports tax and spending restraint, public safety, parental rights, and housing supply [S2].

housing.basis: He emphasizes housing supply and less regulation.

experience.basis: He is an incumbent legislator and House deputy minority leader.

candidates.summary: McEntire is an Army veteran and former state representative seeking to return to the House.
highlights: Emphasizes agriculture, veterans, infrastructure, public safety, and fiscal restraint [S2].

taxes.basis: His stated fiscal-restraint priority supports a tax-limiting direction, though no specific tax proposal is documented.

experience.basis: He is a former state representative.
